rules.diagnosis: Your ads may not be stopping viewers quickly enough.
People are clicking, but not enough viewers are buying.
rules.recommended_step: Improve product demonstration, offer clarity, and CTA strength.

rules.diagnosis: The shop may be spending without enough profitable return.
rules.recommended_step: Test stronger ad angles and creator styles before scaling spend.

rules.diagnosis: Your creative may not be earning enough attention or distribution.
rules.recommended_step: Create multiple new short-form ad variations with stronger hooks.
